The '''''By'ynium''''' was a [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lench]] and destroyed at the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]''
